Jennifer E. Schuster reports institutional support from NIH, the Food and Drug Administration, and the state of Missouri; receipt of consulting fees from the Association of professionals in Infection Control and Epidemiology; speaking honoraria from the Missouri American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP); and paid membership on the Association of American Medical Colleges Advisory Board for a grant awarded for vaccine confidence. Regina M. Simeone reports stock in Pfizer owned by her spouse, which was sold in April 2022. Mary Allen Staat reports institutional support from NIH, Merck, and Cepheid; receipt of royalties from UpToDate Inc.; and consulting fees from Merck. Melissa S. Stockwell reports receipt of support from subcontracts from Boston Children’s Hospital, Vanderbilt University (for RSV surveillance), and Westat (for vaccine effectiveness surveillance), and a service agreement from AAP, paid to trustees of Columbia University.
